title: Post-Graduate Diploma in Multimedia Forensics
content: This program focuses on the scientific examination and authentication of multimedia evidence such as images, videos, audio, and digital content. It equips students with skills to detect manipulation, recover metadata, and analyze forensic artifacts essential for investigations and legal proceedings. Graduation in relevant subjects with minimum 45% marks in aggregate Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. 01 Provide in-depth knowledge and technical skills for the acquisition, authentication, and analysis of digital multimedia evidence including images, audio, and video files. 02 Train students in the use of forensic tools and techniques for detecting tampering, enhancing media quality, and extracting metadata to support digital investigations. 03 Prepare graduates for careers in forensic laboratories, cybercrime units, and digital investigation agencies, with a strong focus on legal admissibility, ethical handling, and data integrity of multimedia evidence. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08
